message:
feat: add AI tool integration bootstrap with backup-first safety

- Add cli/integrations.rs: detect AI tool configs (Claude Code, Codex,
  Gemini, Cursor, Aider), inject sbh hooks idempotently with backup-first
  semantics and rollback on failure
- Wire integrations module into cli/mod.rs
- 16 tests covering JSON/text injection, idempotency, rollback, skip logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
